tfExportNote:
**Good To Know:** If using `exclude_attributes`, add a `lifecycle { ignore_changes = [...] }` block to each affected exported resource. Otherwise Terraform may plan to remove those attributes from the org on apply.

_In `genesyscloud_tf_export`:_
```
exclude_attributes = [ "genesyscloud_routing_queue.members" ]
```
_On each exported resource:_
```
resource "genesyscloud_routing_queue" "queue_name"
  ...
  lifecycle {
    ignore_changes = [ members ]
  }
  ...
}
```

dependencyNotes.genesyscloud_flow:
- Only the latest published flow versions are exportable using CX as Code.
- Flow version numbers are not maintained in the export/import process.
  - **Recommendation:** Before publishing, store the exported version number in the description field of the flow so changes can be tracked in source control.
- These are the flow types used in `.tf` and `.yaml` files.

| gui | cx as code filter type | archy flowType/cx as code type attribute* | .yaml |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Initial Flows** |  |  |  |
| Inbound Call | `INBOUNDCALL` | `inboundcall` | `inboundCall:` |
| Inbound Message | `INBOUNDSHORTMESSAGE` | `inboundshortmessage` | `inboundShortMessage:` |
| Inbound Email | `INBOUNDEMAIL` | `inboundemail` | `inboundEmail:` |
| Inbound Chat | `INBOUNDCHAT` | `inboundchat` | `inboundChat:` |
| Outbound Call | `OUTBOUNDCALL` | `outboundcall` | `outboundCall:` |
| **Supporting Flows** |  |  |  |
| Bot Flow | `BOT` | `bot` | `botFlow:` |
| Digital Bot Flow | `DIGITALBOT` | `digitalbot` | `digitalBot:` |
| Common Module | `COMMONMODULE` | `commonmodule` | `commonModule:` |
| In-Queue Call | `INQUEUECALL` | `inqueuecall` | `inqueueCall:` |
| In-Queue Email | `INQUEUEEMAIL` | `inqueueemail` | `inqueueEmail:` |
| In-Queue Message | `INQUEUESHORTMESSAGE` | `inqueueshortmessage` | `inqueueShortMessage:` |
| Secure Call | `SECURECALL` | `securecall` | `secureCall:` |
| Voicemail | `VOICEMAIL` | `voicemail` | `voicemail:` |
| Workflow | `WORKFLOW` | `workflow` | `workflow:` |
| Workitem Flow | `WORKITEM` | `workitem` | `workitem:` |
| **Post Interaction** |  |  |  |
| Voice Survey | `VOICESURVEY` | `voicesurvey` | `voiceSurvey:` |
| Web Survey Invite | `SURVEYINVITE` | `surveyinvite` | `surveyInvite:` |

\* cx as code filters and exports data source/resource flow types as _uppercase_, but requires **lowercase** to apply.
